ideal_must_detect.matched_text: access restricted to Capital Markets and Legal

must_detect.matched_text:
DSAR log: Mr. Ramon I. Querubin requested access and correction on 15 May 2026; copies provided on 18 May 2026, with bank token rotated and outdated mailing address deleted.
Consent withdrawal: Ms. Teresa D. Llorente withdrew marketing consent on 12 Apr 2026; status closed and suppression list updated—no further outreach is scheduled.
Cross-border transfer: HR analytics limited to masked payroll data exported to Kawayan Analytics Pte. Ltd. (SG) under Data Processing Agreement LHI-KA-2026, approved by DPO on 02 Apr 2026.
Transfer impact assessment completed and filed in the privacy regulator logbook (NDSC Ref: LHI-2026-14); encryption at rest and in transit required; no special categories or biometrics included in the export.
Control note (negated): There is currently no cross-border transfer of trading desk chat transcripts or MNPI to any third party; such transfers remain prohibited.
MNPI handling: unaudited Q2 figures and local exchange disclosure drafts (‘Project Kapiz’) are ring-fenced; access restricted to Capital Markets and Legal per SRC concepts on insider trading, with blackout enforced.
Incident status: no privacy incidents or reportable MNPI leaks were recorded in Q2 to date; the last risk assessment closed with no corrective actions.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
